summary:
SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND GLOBAL PROTESTS: Brandon describes intense spiritual warfare and demonic pressure surrounding his family, emphasizing the necessity of spiritual fortitude. Brandon highlights the fulfillment of his prior warnings regarding massive pro-Palestinian and anti-Israel protests worldwide, specifically citing incidents at the Sydney Opera House in Australia, a two-million-person march in Rome, Italy, and demonstrations in Barcelona, Spain. Brandon connects these events to the proposed two-state solution and warns of a rapid escalation of global anti-Semitism that will eventually target conservative Christian beliefs.

TERROR THREATS AND DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE: Brandon details specific visions and recent news concerning domestic security threats within the United States. Brandon mentions a bomb threat in the New York subway system and a plot to release large quantities of toxic, radioactive materials into the Hudson River. Furthermore, Brandon describes the discovery of underground communication networks involving hundreds of hidden SIM cards, specifically mentioning a station in New Jersey. Brandon warns of an impending Red Dawn or Pearl Harbor-style scenario, urging vigilance against an enemy operating from within the nation.

POLITICAL CORRUPTION AND SOCIETAL DECAY: Brandon expresses deep concern over the infiltration of radical ideologies and the moral decay of America, attributing this decline primarily to the compromise of the modern church. Brandon strongly opposes welfare mentalities, the push for free healthcare, and the hatred toward wealthy job creators, advocating instead for a strong work ethic and capitalistic endeavors. Brandon also discusses the battle against Sharia law in the United States, praising states like Louisiana, Tennessee, and Utah for standing against it, while noting the failures of states with liberal politicians to do the same.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS: Brandon shares visions of future geopolitical events, including biological attacks on Israel and an event more severe than October 7th orchestrated in the middle of the night. Brandon foresees assassination attempts against Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and a plot to replace Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky with an elderly proxy leader. Additionally, Brandon claims there are traitors deciphering codes and leaking sensitive information from within the Pentagon, the White House, the justice system, and law enforcement, noting that the military is conducting polygraph tests on thousands of personnel to root out this corruption.

SEISMIC ACTIVITY AND EUROPEAN SHAKINGS: Brandon predicts massive geographical and structural shakings across the globe. Brandon warns of devastating earthquakes targeting California, where land will break off into the ocean, as well as seismic activity in Seattle and British Columbia. Looking toward Europe, Brandon prophesies a literal and spiritual shaking in Italy, the Vatican, and Monte Carlo, describing the latter as a corrupted safe haven for the wealthy. Despite these turbulent events, Brandon asserts that this shaking will awaken the church and spark a massive global revival, particularly in regions like South Korea, China, and Europe.

END TIMES TIMELINE AND THE ANTICHRIST SYSTEM: Brandon outlines an accelerated timeline for the end times, identifying September 23rd as a critical point of no return. Brandon describes the rise of an Islamic Antichrist figure, the Mahdi, who will use the Abrahamic Accords to establish a false peace and facilitate the building of the Third Temple. Brandon points to the rapid advancement of digital IDs in nations like Australia and the UK as the foundation of the beast system, arguing that the United States, specifically under the leadership of Donald Trump, serves as a temporary roadblock to this globalist agenda, granting the church a window to prepare and evangelize.

SPIRITUAL HARVEST AND DIVINE PROTECTION: Brandon concludes with an encouraging message about the impending wealth transfer and supernatural deliverance for faithful believers. Brandon promises that individuals struggling with lifelong addictions will experience sudden freedom and that financial breakthroughs, likened to low-hanging fruit, will manifest for those who trust in divine provision. Brandon continually references Psalms 91 and 23, urging believers to anoint their homes with oil, rely on the blood of Jesus, and maintain bold faith to participate in the greatest harvest of souls the world has ever seen.
rawData: [October 06, 2025]-[Let's pray today]-[https://youtu.be/I3CfQxKRd30]-[Hey, good morning, evening, family. Thank you for joining me tonight. I haven't been on in a while. I've been just seeking the Lord and asking Him, basically, what's coming, praying over our nation, praying over the things that I last live, all the heaviness of that. It has been a major spiritual warfare concerning all this stuff, and I truly appreciate all y'all's prayers for my family. There's a lot of things that are happening in the spirit realm concerning us that I just don't go into. And so, I just want to tell you all thank you for your prayers for us. It means a lot, and I can feel them. And so, I just wanted to say thank you for praying for my family, thank you for praying for us. When you poke the devil in the eye, you get a reaction, and that's all I'll say about it. And so, I just wanted to say first and foremost, thank you for praying for us. There is a lot going on, and I say that a lot, but it seems as we keep getting into this, it's an escalation. It just keeps escalating and escalating, just like from the 23rd. We see the two-state solution. They're talking about all this stuff, talking about Israel, Gaza, talking about peace. But at the same time, I warned you all that there would be an attempt to have an event at Sydney at the Opera House. And if you go back to the videos back whenever I spoke about it, I told you that there would be a major event tried to take place at the Opera House. Well, today or yesterday, can you play that video? There were all kinds of threats at that Opera House, and they had a massive protest event in Australia concerning Palestine and Israel. And so, this is prophecy unfolding. This is a watchman unfolding. This is all happening just as we speak, this stuff I told you. I saw that if we did not pray, there would be major explosions and things taking place in Sydney, and it would be around that Opera House. And I've warned of this for several months, warning about this and telling you what I saw concerning an uprising of anti-Semitism and protests and things happening in Australia. So, do you have the video ready, son? Well, he can't get it working; it's like frozen or something. But it's happening in Australia. And so, we see, if you look it up, you can find it yourself, but there's a lot of protests and a lot of major uprising going on there right now. And at the same time, in Italy, I believe I saw a two-million-man march in Europe concerning the two-state solution and the Palestinian rioting, and all this stuff happening even in Rome. So, another major incident happened in Rome this week. Then we see another bomb threat. We even had a bomb threat in New York this week, and I thought that was kind of interesting. It was around the subway system, and then whatever we've been praying over the Hudson River. From what I understood, somebody's wanting to introduce 40,000 gallons or more of toxic stuff into the Hudson as we're praying this nuclear stuff into the Hudson. So, we're praying over the Hudson. I thought that was interesting, because the Lord keeps bringing up the Hudson River, praying over the Hudson River, and then they say, 'We're going to release all this radioactive stuff into the water.' And I thought, why would anybody do that? That just doesn't make any sense, you know? Why would you want to pollute your own water? I just don't get it. But, you know, people don't make sense in a lot of places. I just thought that was really interesting that they were talking about that pollution in the water. Do you have that article? Could you show them that? Move on. And so, go down. I want to show them this about the Sharia law. Go right there. Right there. Go and show them. So, the only states that have come against Sharia law are Louisiana, Tennessee, and Utah that have really come against it. So, in progress, what they're working on, all the red is a definite no, and then the green-looking color, they're working on it. So, Oklahoma, Texas, Kansas, Arkansas. Pretty amazing, you know, that we have these great governors coming against that so we won't have Sharia law. But I thought it was kind of cool that that gives you a visual so you can see it. That's what we're praying into. That's what we will pray into tonight, that our governors, our state senators, and our representatives in our own states will rise up and ban this from taking place in our states. We don't want that going on here. And so, pretty interesting, I think. Oh, there's Florida, too. Florida stood against it—tried but failed. Tried but failed. Oh, I didn't realize that was tried but failed. Yes. Working on it is green. Working on it, green. Tried but failed. So, basically, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, all those blues, they tried but they failed. So, they have people in there that are liberal, obviously, that want it. So, we pray for all these other states that are going to try to stand against Sharia law. We don't want that in our states. We don't want that kind of... I know I'm not really familiar with all that it entails, but I know that I don't want it. I want us to be a Christian state. I want us to stand like a backbone, like a crowbar for the Lord Jesus Christ in these last days, that we would be a place of revival, that we would be a place of great outpouring of the Spirit of God. Not saying that all the others that are red won't have that, but I'm just saying, as for me and my house, what we stand for, even what we stand for on this channel, we stand for the Lord Jesus Christ. So, I think it's interesting, the signs of the times and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. Where are we? And this is the kind of stuff that we're seeing. We're seeing major protests in these cities all around the world, as you see. Do you have those articles? Major protests. And we see all those major things happening all around. We see they're getting ready for earthquakes. They're talking about earthquakes. They're talking about all the things that we're seeing in prayer ahead of time. So, what's the most amazing part, ladies and gentlemen, is we see it months before we see it in the news. We are the news. And that's what the Lord told us we needed to be. We're not reporters. We're not going and praying about the news. We're praying before the news happens, making a place of preparation, telling the people what's coming, so that we're watchmen on the wall. So, as we see this last prayer call, I saw some things that were very dark, and it was very heavy, a lot of the things that the Lord has shown me. So, I have really had to go by myself with my wife and my kids to really pray over things, because He would not allow me to let it be public. We see more SIM cards unfolding in New Jersey. I don't know how many hundreds of more SIM cards with a new little station they found again, with more acceleration of this. So, then you see that. Do you see that, son? Did you show them that? That's the protest. Where is that at? In Italy. Italy. Okay, this is Italy. There are over two million people in Italy? Spain. Spain. Barcelona. Barcelona, Spain. So, there are over two million people protesting and doing that today, right? Yeah, today. This happened today, or October 4th? October 4th. Yesterday. Do you see how many people? This is an uprising. I told you great anti-Semitism will rise up in the days ahead, great persecution will come, and then it will spread to the church. It won't just stop with the Jews. I saw it coming against Christian thinking, conservative thinking: a great persecution. I saw an olive press coming on the church in the days ahead. And you know, when you feel like—I said what I have felt privately, what I don't get into—the pressure, it makes you, in the natural, want to retreat from what you're doing and go, 'Why hold on? Why am I doing this?' But then you realize God's called you, and God asked you to do it. Because I told Dee, I said, 'You know, it wouldn't be nothing to just push the button and walk away because of what we're feeling and what's happening.' But there is accountability by the Holy Spirit of what He's asked you to do in these last days. And I said, 'Fear God, not man. Fear God, not man. Fear God, not man, for what they threaten, how they threaten you.' When you're uncovering things that are very heavy, that weight of threats, the weight of persecution, the weight of feeling unsafe, nobody's ever going to understand that until they walk it. And unless you've been on a public platform, and as fast as this has grown, it's really easy to be in the peanut gallery and say, 'Well, I could do it,' until it starts hitting your walls. It's easy to say that. That is what I'm trying to tell y'all. Until that starts happening to you, and you've got demonic stuff going on and you've got this, and you go, 'Well, my goodness, we obviously struck a nerve.' But it is, like I said, it has been a very interesting several days for us. But I just want to tell you all, because I saw we will give an account unto the Lord one day for everything He's called you to do and everything you chose not to do because of what He asked you to do, if that makes sense. Every one of us will give an account to the Father one day. No matter what, it may be the smallest thing in your eyes and it may be the largest thing, but every one of us will give an account to Him. And the Lord said, 'Fear Me, not man.' If they can take the life from your lungs, if they try to do all these things, get into Psalm 91. Get into 'The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want,' Psalm 23. Get into 'A thousand shall fall at your side and ten thousand at your right hand,' because it's just going to escalate and increase. This is a low level compared to what's going to happen. We are in a time like we've never seen before. And the Lord said things are about to... You think this right here is something that you're seeing, all that is going on right here? These are little things compared to the escalation of where we are in the end times. My people need to get ready for what is about to take place—a great shaking to awaken. We're just barely at the very top of the surface of things for the beginning of sorrows. We're just seeing this, folks. And that's what He told me. He said, 'Brandon, do you not realize on the 23rd of September is the point of no return? Now things are going to get radical.' Do you understand? Do you understand? We saw some things, but we're about to see some major things—signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And that's why He told me, 'You pray against the plague that's trying to come. Pray for protection over the nation, for a great uprising of anti-Semitism, for they have to defeat the eagle so that they can get to Israel. They have to try to be an infestation of their radical Islamic ideas to infiltrate America to change it within.' We must defend the eagle. And the Lord was showing me the crippling of the eagle, trying to—all of what's come across the border, trying to influence not just with fear tactics, but infiltrate the politics and the very structure of America altogether, what we stand for, our Constitution, challenging it with different ideas and their theology of what they believe: having our women walk around with those tarps on their heads, not eating pork, not doing things. We shouldn't eat pork anyway, but I mean, it's really toxic. As we see this man that was eating pork in England, and they saw him eating pork in England—and I can't play the video because it has so much foul language, but they beat him because he was eating pork on the side of the road. It's not funny. Forgive me. I just thought how ridiculous it's getting. It's not funny, but I try to find the humor in things. I think this is getting out of control. These people are—I mean, you're going to beat somebody for eating pork? They just went nuts on him, and they're serious. Yeah. So you see, they are very upset about it. I don't know if he was eating bacon or ham, but whatever. But if it starts over there, it will try to spread over here. You think, 'Well, it will never happen here,' but I'm sure they thought the same thing. As you get radicalized in your mind and you get your government to start—for instance, New York City. If you get that mayor that everybody's thinking is the greatest thing, 'Well, he's going to give us free healthcare and give us food stores all over the place, give us free food and free...' Folks, there's nothing free. Somebody's got to pay for it. There are no free medicines; somebody is paying for it. Right? Do you understand? 'Well, you know, he's going to give...' You know, I saw 'F the rich,' 'tax the rich,' all about attacking the rich. The rich people are the ones that made the jobs for the poor people to have a job, but they want to attack the rich and tell them, 'F the rich,' and do all these bad things, and want to kill all the rich people. And they're the ones that started a business, just like anybody else has the opportunity in America to start something. If you just put a little oomph behind something, whether it's eBay or Poshmark or like us, you can take nothing and make it into something. But it just takes a little bit of backbone to say, 'Hey, this is what I want to do, what God's called me to do,' and He'll breathe on your business. But most people want to sit by with a welfare mentality and have their hand out saying, 'I want a free hot dog,' or, 'I want a free something. Give me my free cell phone. I want free medical. I want free this. I want free that.' But they don't want to put the effort into doing it. And that's ridiculous. If you don't work, you don't eat. That's just what I believe. If you don't put your boat in motion and work hard like everybody has the opportunity to, by the sweat of your brow, to say, 'Listen...' I believe that God will anoint your hands to prosper in every area of your life. But a percentage—that's a better way to say it. The Lord said, 'It's not most, don't exaggerate.' A percentage of people have a welfare mentality thinking, 'Hey, it should be free to me because I've had a hard life.' Who hasn't had a hard life? Who hasn't had challenges? I'm not a victim. I choose, even with the education that I have—and I barely have a GED because I struggled all through, being a janitor most of my life and doing all that I have—I told myself regardless, I'm going to come up with an idea, either detailing cars or doing... and then God gave us eBay and Poshmark, selling on those platforms, finding stuff at thrift stores. You have to have a can-do attitude. Even if you sell a pair of jeans and you bought it for 50 cents and you sell it for $5, it's a better day. Do you see what I'm saying? Even if you only sell ten items in that day and you really tried hard, and you found it, and you spent maybe two bucks and you sold it for less than 100, it's still a good day. And if you do that every day, that turns really nice, and then it multiplies the more you work at it. But my point is that there are a lot of times I feel like people—like I see on here, our government shut down still. We're going into like three or four days of this, and they say, 'Well, we want to give free healthcare out to everybody, to the immigrants that are coming over.' We need to give free healthcare." And I'm thinking, "That's absurd. You don't give free healthcare to me. Are y'all kidding me? Well, we should give them free healthcare." No. No, you shouldn't give them free healthcare. You shouldn't. You know, I don't even believe that we need free healthcare. And I'm an American citizen that pays taxes. That's absurd. Nothing is free. It costs people something. You work hard. I don't ever expect anybody just to give you a handout. You know what I'm saying? Unless God's put it on their heart to sow a seed. That's different. But I just don't understand the mentality of people. And I watch it on these videos, and Braden shows them to me because I don't watch a lot of the news. I don't like to filter it, but Braden, he is in it all day long. He's a little news guy. And I told him, he goes, "Dad, did you see this?" I said, "Wow, this is crazy." Remember the word that I told you to watch the opera house? Tell us in the comments right now. Do you remember when I told you all about the opera house and I said, "Watch the opera house. Watch what happens with the opera house and the uprising that will take place there." That's what I was seeing right there. Isn't that amazing? It's right there in the news. Everything I tell you is coming. Watch the opera house. Does anybody remember that? We can make a short about it if you don't, because it's there. And I got video after video of warning you of things coming just like that are going to escalate in a way that is going to be shock and awe in the days ahead. And I saw a storm around Benjamin. And I saw a storm around Israel on all sides coming. And I saw biological attacks coming to Israel. They say that peace and safety is coming on right now off this Gaza and Hamas. I'm telling you, they're plotting and planning something much worse than October 7th is what I saw. And the Lord said this will happen in the middle of the night. They're moving in the night. And the Lord told us that they will try to actually take out Benjamin. If anybody understands what I'm trying to say. And I even saw them trying to take out Zelensky, trying to put in a proxy government that's pro-Ukraine, pro-Russia, and that they would have a new face. And it was an elderly man. I saw him, that was pro-Ukraine, pro-Russia in the days ahead. If everybody remembers that, do you remember that? And I think that's interesting because I have these glimpses and I'm able to see way up in the future of something that they're plotting and planning. And I even remember who was over it and who did it, but I can't say their names on here because the Lord actually showed me the faces of the men that were over it. There's a lot of things I can't say anymore because I have so much different law enforcement. I try to watch what I say. I don't want to cause fear in people's hearts, but I still deliver the word the best I can to you of what the Lord is saying. Last time, I was not able to really deliver a lot of that. All I was able to do is touch the surface. Everything I was shown Wednesday night was wow. And I didn't know how to really process it by myself. And it took me all these days praying over our nation because of what I've seen—an enemy within, a Red Dawn experience, Pearl Harbor. And I gave keywords like Timothy McVeigh and things like that to pray about, and there are so many of you all that are mature enough to handle it, and you prayed and helped me. And it's not over praying over this beautiful nation, but it's working as we saw bomb threats in—where did you have the bomb threats? Yes. Which one? Was in New Jersey and they shut down. They said it was all okay. But it goes identically alongside what I told you we had to pray for. This is a big deal. This is it. And I thought, isn't that interesting? I don't know if they found the person who's giving the threats, but this is the same subway system, the bus, the transit, the systems of how everybody travels in these major cities, praying over our protection. Do you have it? Just show them. I have it on—yeah, that's fine. You don't have to show them. Just show them the article. They can see it. "Times Square subway trains canceled, NYPD on the scene." Do you understand? This is what we are praying into. This just happened. This is what I told you. I said I have an urgency. We must pray right now. This is what we were praying over and I couldn't get into all of it. Do you all see? I have a big responsibility and the Lord keeps telling me, "You must pray. You must pray." And as we're able to divert things, stop things, we saw more, like I said, of the SIM cards being uncovered. An underground networking of communication and chatter that is beyond what you all can comprehend, from New York to Seattle. It covers the whole nation. And I saw more of those little cards. I saw lots of them. And they were in lots of different cities. They uncovered one thing in New York—well, several little things—but this is a vast network that spans throughout. Then we see our military, and I warned you. I warned you of a rat within. Remember I said there's a rat in the White House, there's a rat in the Pentagon, there's a rat in the law enforcement, there's a rat in the judges. This right here is them obviously taking prayer. We're praying into this, saying that they want to make each one of these men have a polygraph test. 5,000 men go through a polygraph test. Why? Because they got to figure out who's a rat. And there's rats. And I said, "The man that I see has all these badges, just like that." And I said, "There's somebody in there." And remember when I told you, did I say that publicly? Yeah, I did. Yeah. About rats within the Pentagon. I know. But what the man doing that and deciphering code? Yeah, like I made that public. Okay, I have to go over it because he's the only one. He's my scribe. He writes everything down. You said you sent it to family. Okay. So I saw the man in the Pentagon taking a deciphered message and giving it to somebody in Europe, and then Europe was giving it to another person in another area. So as they were communicating, it was a three-way tie delivering secret information out of the Pentagon into other countries—a rat within. And the Lord told us that, remember? Like I said, I don't remember some of the stuff I make public, and I can't even believe I did that. But since I already did, it's there. But I go, okay, that was really probably not wise. But we see it. It's on the news. There's another article. All these guys, it's not just about them saying you're too fat and you got to lose weight, or about being homosexual or whatever. It's something deeper. What was on the 100,000 SIM cards that they found? This is a much bigger picture, a much bigger picture. We have an enemy within. And there's some things I really wish I could say because I'm telling you, these guys, there are some evil people out there. Boy, we have some evil people out there. Let's take communion and let's just pray. I've kept you all long enough. It's already way too late. I came on—we had a guest speaker at our church tonight, and I try to fill myself up by listening. Nancy Dufresne, healing evangelist. You know, it's a blessing whenever a different kind of anointing comes to your church, but she's long-winded compared to a lot. So we're here a lot later. I didn't get to go, I watch it online. So I keep myself full. I just love you all. I truly am so thankful for every single one of you. You've made such a difference in our life by praying for us and being a part of our prayer family. I'm believing God that there's something major about to happen, that Megan is going to be healed this month. I just believe there's something major; I can feel it. When the demonic pressure comes on so strong and you feel what I have felt and what's happened, you know that a breakthrough is right around the corner. He comes to test it—the devil does—because he sees something major is about to happen for your life. It's like the one-yard line that Pastor Chip always talks about: the bigger the linemen come out whenever you're first-and-goal. You're about ready to make a touchdown, but he sends his bigger devils out to keep you from getting the touchdown. And you may be first-and-goal, and you've got four downs left. And you're saying, 'Hey, I can hit this thing four times.' But the devil tried to knock you down at the first-and-goal. Either you have a backbone, stand up, and say, 'I'm pushing through, and I'm going to get that touchdown. I'm going to get my victory,' because he knows that you're first-and-goal. He knows you're first-and-goal. And that's where we are right now with a lot of people in the victory of their lives. He knows that there's an expiration date to your problem, that your victory is coming. Do you understand? There's an expiration date to it. And that's what I'm trying to tell you all: he knows when you're about to get your major breakthrough. And I can feel it, that there's something major about to happen in the body of Christ. And the Lord said to me when I was going through all this this week, he said, 'I'm watching. What are you going to do? Are you going to turn tail and run? Are you going to practice what you preach, even when all this stuff is privately coming against you? Are you going to turn tail and run?' Because your flesh gets a little—I could physically, in the spirit realm, hear the roar. The roar. You know the Bible says the devil is a roaring lion seeking whom he may devour. He couldn't devour, but he's roaring. And the roar, you know, when you hear—if you've ever been to the zoo and heard how loud a lion's roar is, it's very intimidating. It echoes through the whole zoo. You can be at one point in the zoo, because we have a really big zoo and a big lion exhibit here in Oklahoma City. The lion is so loud when that lion is going, you can hear it. It echoes and vibrates through the air all throughout the whole zoo, and it's massive, and you go, 'Whoa, what is that?' But you can hear it, and it's so loud, it's intimidating. Clear to the parking lot, and you're going, 'What in the world is that? That sounds weird.' And it's so loud, and it vibrates, and you can feel the power of that lion's roar. When he's growling, making that growl sound, you can hear it. And the Lord reminded me as I was dealing with some stuff, he said, 'You hear the roar, don't you?' I said, 'Yeah, I do. My flesh is a little scared right now, Lord, in the natural. I need you to give me comfort.' He said, 'Are you going to turn tail and run, Brennon? Are you going to run from the roaring lion seeking whom he may devour? Are you going to run?' I said, 'Lord, my flesh wants to, but I fear God. I fear you, Lord. I don't fear man.' When I hear this roar, and it's so loud, it's literal. I can hear it in the spirit. And I sat there, and I could hear the chatter in the spirit realm all outside. And my little girl came and said, 'Daddy, what are we going to do?' because they could see I was acting a little off the last couple of days. She goes, 'You know, I was praying for you last night in the spirit. All night long, I prayed in tongues. I was praying for you in tongues, Daddy.' And she goes, 'What are we going to do, Daddy?' I said, 'Well, we're going to anoint the house with oil, honey.' And she goes, 'Okay, well, give me my own oil.' So, I gave her one of Billy Burke's oils he gave me. She was so excited; she treasured it. She took it, went in there, and started going, 'I plead the blood. I plead the blood.' She was anointing our house with oil. It made me proud. It's real to us. It's real to my kids: the power of the blood of Jesus when the storm winds blow on your house and you can feel the demonic, and you know you've poked him in the eye and there's so much going on that I will never talk about on here. But either you believe it or you don't. Either you believe like he said: you either believe in Psalms 91 in these last days and you stand and say what I've told you to say, or you don't. You either get Psalms 91 down inside of you and Psalms 23. I told you, if you do not get Psalms 91... I need my peppermint, sorry. When I start crying, it causes drainage. Sorry, y'all, I get too emotional. It's real to us. Like I said, you may be watching a video, you may be watching a live stream right now, but what I'm doing is something that most people would never have the courage to do. I can assure you there's a lot of lip service, and there are a lot of things that I think a lot of people say, 'Oh yeah, I do that.' And when the Lord looked at me and he pointed his finger at me and he said, 'Are you willing to die for me? Are you willing to stand on the wall and tell the people the hard things? I've called you to say the hard things that no one else will say. I've called you to warn my people that I'm coming. There will be great reward to this, but it will cost.' And he said, 'You haven't even hardly done anything yet for what I've really called you to do.' And I was like, 'Man, oh yeah, Lord, let's do this.'
